name: Barrington Kent Street Park Tennis / Pickleball courts
description: Come play pickleball at Barrington Kent Street Park Tennis / Pickleball courts in Barrington, RI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Barrington Middle School Outdoor Pickleball Courts
description: Barrington Middle School Outdoor Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Barrington, RI. There are 8 outdoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Bristol Town Commons Park
description: There are two pickleball lined courts that require portable nets in addition to the 6 dedicated courts.

name: Burrs Hill Park
description: Burrs Hill Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Warren, RI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Chianese Park
description: There may be portable nets during certain seasons

name: East Bay Pickleball Club
description: East Bay Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Warren, RI. There are 9 indoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, adaptive programming, trainers or lessons, and lights. Reservations are available.

name: Jamiel's Park
description: Come play pickleball at Jamiel's Park in Warren, RI! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: North Farm Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at North Farm Pickleball in Bristol, RI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Quinta-Gamelin Community Center
description: Quinta-Gamelin Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bristol, RI. There are 4 courts. 2 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.
